description: Two receipts for payment of kharāj in grain (qamḥ)and beans (fūl) on one sheet of paper from 535/1140–41 (date works well with return to collection in kind), written 16 Dhū l-Qaʿda 536, which also makes sense because the harvest is in April/May and then you dry the grain and then you bring it to the granaries. The first date could be kharājiyya and the second in hijrī. The tax payer is Ibrāhīm b. ʿAlī. There are multiple ʿalāma on the documents(s), once including, "الحمد لله على نعمه". The horizontal lines are written on the sheet to divide the two receipts. (MR, LB, SL, NV)
description_he: שני קבלות לתשלום כראג' בחיטה ופול מ-535 להג'רה (1140-41), כתובים 16 בדו אל-קעדה 536, משלם המס הוא איברהים בן עלי
